{{Infobox character
| name = Forest Demon
| aliases = Demon of the forest
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[House of Blades (novel)|House of Blades]]
}}

== House of Blades ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] asks the hooded man if he is the [[Forest Demon]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c1">''House of Blades'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Demon]] of the forest has tangled, wiry white hair.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c5">''House of Blades'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Demon]] of the forest possesses a [[sword]] with a blade six or seven feet long.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c5" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Forest Demon]] is an old legend that may apply to [[Indirial]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
